hero.name: Salesforce DevOps Starter Kit
hero.tagline: Compose flexible, GitHub-native pipelines from small, focused Actions - or drop in a ready-made reusable workflow and be productive in minutes.

image.alt: Composable GitHub Actions building blocks for Salesforce CI/CD

blocks.tagline: Resolve and set up the Node.js version from package.json.
Install the Salesforce CLI and related plugins.
Authenticate to any org via SFDX Auth URL or the JWT flow.
Create a scratch org and output its username and org ID.
Delete a scratch org to clean up after a pipeline run.
Deploy metadata, with delta and validation-only (dry-run) modes.
Run Apex, LWC (Jest) and Flow tests with coverage reporting.
Static quality gate: Code Analyzer, Prettier and ESLint.
Install managed or unlocked packages on a target org.
Import records via Bulk API 2.0 (CSV) or sObject Tree (JSON).
